title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Atlas, Unknown person #3, Kuma, Bonney as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the approaching ship friend or foe?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's just like the newspaper said!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He already digested ALL that food?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may gobble us up if we get any closer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not good!! We're Sur- Rounded by flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't stay on the island much longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pull it together... don't worry about him being an emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get him into Seastone cuffs, on the count of three!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Keep blasting into the inferno!! Don't stop!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
